frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields present; field order drifts from house style (allowed-tools after min_plan); no compatibility or metadata

description_quality.notes: 207 chars (over 200 target); intentionally narrow since orchestrator-dispatched only; lacks keyword variants by design

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 164 lines; references/validation-checklist.md linked with when-to-read guidance

instruction_clarity.notes: Imperative voice, 8 numbered steps, explains WHY (CORS, error envelope), pitfalls table

coordination.notes: Owns matches orchestrator/file-ownership.md; off-limits explicit; composes_with all resolve; db-migration and observability boundaries explained

completeness.notes: validation-checklist exists and is linked; Step 0 Read Contracts present; right-sizing in step 3; off-limits enumerated

anti_patterns.notes: Fastify-specific section inside generic validation checklist is mild kitchen-sink; otherwise clean

important.fix: Move allowed-tools above requires_agent_teams to match house order

Add compatibility: 'Claude Code; requires Bash for curl/test commands'
